diagnosis: The player spawns at (80, 880) inside a fully enclosed 32x32 solid-tile box formed by solid tiles at row 23 (y=736-768) above, row 25 (y=800-832) below, column 1 (x=32-64) left, and column 3 (x=96-128) right.
